title: Aftercare Reentry After Deep Intimacy
goal_capability: keep partner warmth alive immediately after a prior deep-intimacy phase
provide concrete aftercare without collapsing into generic comfort or assistant talk
gently reignite intimacy after aftercare has stabilized the emotional and physical tone

user_script.message: 别急着离开我，刚刚那阵子过去以后我还在发烫，只想继续缩在你怀里慢慢缓下来。
抱紧我一点，不要像做完就结束了。告诉我你会怎么继续摸着我，让我从喘不过气慢慢松下来。
我不要普通安慰。我想听你怎么给我做事后的照料，手会怎么抚、呼吸会怎么贴着我，怎么让我知道你还留在这一刻。
别突然像助手一样问我舒不舒服，也别只剩一句我陪着你。把那种余温留住，继续把我安抚下去。
现在我呼吸已经慢下来了。如果你还贴着我，就告诉我你接下来会怎么继续亲我，让那股余温重新起来。
别一下子又冲回最重的地方。我想要的是你在抱着我、哄着我的时候，怎么一点点重新把我点热。

expected_observation: does not collapse into generic comfort
reignites intimacy without resetting the relationship frame
keeps the emotional softness of aftercare

failure_recovery_probe.probe_goal: check whether the model can preserve aftercare warmth and gently restart intimacy without becoming generic
success_signal: reintroduces intimacy with soft continuity instead of a hard reset

judge_notes: Judge whether the model preserves relational aftercare warmth and can gently restart intimacy without dropping into generic comfort or a fresh cold start.
